decks.notes: The main focus of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells. The deck includes a mix of efficient creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Territorial Kavu, along with powerful burn spells like Lightning Bolt. Leyline of the Guildpact and Leyline Binding help to support the aggro strategy by adding additional damage and control elements. Overall, the key concept of this deck is to apply constant pressure on the opponent and win the game as quickly as possible through a combination of creature aggression and burn spells.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on aggressive creature plays and burn spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent. Utilizing powerful creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls, along with burn spells like Galvanic Discharge and Lightning Bolt, the deck aims to quickly chip away at the opponent's life total. The inclusion of Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Boromir, Warden of the Tower provide additional threats and support for the aggressive strategy. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Static Prison and Thraben Charm to hinder the opponent's game plan and protect its own creatures.

The main idea of this Boros Aggro deck is to quickly generate pressure on the opponent by playing low-cost, aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls. The deck also includes cards like Voice of Victory and Ajani, Nacatl Pariah to support the creatures and provide additional threats. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and efficient attack strategy, while also disrupting their game plan with cards like Lightning Bolt and Blood Moon. The mana base is carefully designed to support the aggressive game plan and ensure consistent casting of spells.

The deck focuses on quickly building a board presence with efficient creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls, backed up by burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Galvanic Discharge to push through damage. The inclusion of cards like Goblin Bombardment and Boromir, Warden of the Tower allows for direct damage to the opponent and board control. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah provides additional value by creating tokens and gaining life. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells while maintaining control of the battlefield.

The deck focuses on quickly reanimating powerful creatures from the graveyard using cards like Goryo's Vengeance and Faithful Mending. It also utilizes instant cards like Ephemerate and Solitude to control the board and protect key combo pieces. The deck can quickly assemble a winning board state by combining card draw, control, and reanimation to overwhelm opponents. It aims to win the game by efficiently bringing back powerful creatures like Griselbrand and Atraxa, Grand Unifier to dominate the battlefield and ensure victory.

The main concept of this Merfolk aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy. The deck focuses on playing powerful Merfolk creatures like Lord of Atlantis and Master of the Pearl Trident, while also using disruption spells like Sink into Stupor and Flare of Denial to control the game. Aether Vial and Cavern of Souls help ensure that Merfolk spells can be cast efficiently, while Mutavault provides an extra threat on the battlefield. Overall, this deck aims to win quickly by building a strong board presence and maximizing the power of its Merfolk creatures.

The main concept of this UR Aggro deck is to maximize card advantage and tempo by utilizing cheap, efficient spells and creatures to apply pressure on the opponent. The deck focuses on using quick and aggressive creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Dragon's Rage Channeler, backed up by removal spells like Lightning Bolt and Lava Dart. The deck also includes cantrips like Preordain and Mishra's Bauble to help dig for key cards and maintain consistency in drawing threats. Additionally, the deck includes bounce spells like Boomerang Basics for disruption and tempo advantage.

The deck focuses on controlling the game through counterspells, removal spells, and card draw. It aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while setting up its own win conditions. It utilizes cards like Teferi, Time Raveler and Narset, Parter of Veils to generate card advantage and slow down the opponent. The deck also includes a variety of removal spells like Solitude and Prismatic Ending to handle threats on the board. Overall, the deck aims to control the game until it can establish a dominant position and win.

The focus of this deck is to control the board with counterspells, removal, and card advantage while using Narset, Parter of Veils to restrict the opponent's resources. The inclusion of creatures with flash like Solitude allows for reactive plays, and Teferi, Time Raveler provides additional control and tempo advantage. The deck also utilizes artifacts like Isochron Scepter and Monumental Henge for extra value. Overall, the strategy revolves around slowing down the opponent's game plan and eventually overwhelming them with card advantage and powerful threats.

The deck focuses on utilizing cards like Goryo's Vengeance and Ephemerate to quickly reanimate powerful creatures like Griselbrand and Atraxa, Grand Unifier from the graveyard. Cards like Psychic Frog and Quantum Riddler help filter through the deck and set up the combo pieces. Thoughtseize and Force of Negation provide disruption to prevent the opponent from stopping the combo. The deck aims to quickly assemble the combo pieces and overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures and instant-speed reanimation.

The focus of this deck is to control the game through a combination of counterspells, removal, and card advantage. It utilizes a variety of tools such as Teferi, Narset, and Orim's Chant to disrupt the opponent's game plan and maintain control of the board. The deck aims to stall the game until it can establish a dominant position with powerful finishers like Wrath of the Skies and Teferi, Hero of Dominaria. By carefully managing resources and utilizing versatile spells, this deck seeks to outlast and outmaneuver its opponent to secure victory.

This deck focuses on assembling a variety of creatures that can be searched for and put into play using Green Sun's Zenith and other creature tutors. By utilizing creatures like Devoted Druid and Vizier of Remedies, the deck aims to generate infinite mana to power up a massive Walking Ballista or Craterhoof Behemoth for a game-winning combo. Additionally, the deck includes disruptive elements like Leyline of Abundance and Ouroboroid to control the board and protect its combo pieces. The main goal is to efficiently utilize creature synergies to overwhelm the opponent and secure victory.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with a mix of aggressive creatures and direct damage spells. With a low curve and efficient threats like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Guide of Souls, the deck aims to apply pressure early and maintain tempo throughout the game. Key cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Goblin Bombardment provide additional reach and utility, while cards like Lightning Bolt and Seasoned Pyromancer help control the board and clear the way for attacks. With a mix of creatures, burn spells, and combat tricks, this deck aims to outpace and outmaneuver the opponent for a swift victory.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly swarm the board with artifact creatures and utilize artifacts and non-creature artifacts to disrupt the opponent while also building up a threatening board presence. The deck aims to control the game through various artifacts like Mox Opal, Urza's Saga, and Engineered Explosives, while also utilizing cards like Claws of Gix and Tormod's Crypt for disruption. Emry, Lurker of the Loch helps recur artifacts and keep the pressure up, with support from cards like Mishra's Bauble and Metallic Rebuke. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggression and disruption.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly flood the board with artifact creatures and use cards like Mishra's Bauble and Urza's Saga to gain card advantage. The deck also utilizes cards like Engineered Explosives and Metallic Rebuke to control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy. Emry, Lurker of the Loch is used to recur artifacts from the graveyard, while Pinnacle Emissary and Kappa Cannoneer provide additional value. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures and disruptive spells, quickly closing out the game before the opponent can stabilize.

The main concept of this Landless Combo deck is to quickly assemble your combo pieces and disrupt your opponent's plans using counterspells and removal spells. By utilizing cards like Lotus Bloom and Whir of Invention, you can fetch key combo pieces like Goblin Charbelcher to deal massive damage to your opponent. The deck focuses on controlling the board through countering spells with cards like Disrupting Shoal and Force of Negation, while also having the ability to draw more cards and dig for key pieces with cards like Sea Gate Restoration and Waterlogged Teachings.
